    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
FROM Customers c
JOIN Orders o 
    ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items oi 
    ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_first_name, c.customer_last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 2
   AND COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3;

SELECT o.date_order_placed AS order_date,

HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1
ORDER BY order_date;

FROM Orders

UNION ALL

ORDER BY order_date;

SELECT 'Earliest Order Date' AS category, MIN(date_order_placed) AS order_date
FROM Orders
UNION
SELECT 'Orders with >1 item' AS category, o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(date_order_placed) AS order_date,
    'Earliest Order' AS record_type
FROM Orders
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    o.date_order_placed AS order_date,

JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1
ORDER BY order_date;

SELECT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING o.date_order_placed = (
           SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders
       )
       OR COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING o.date_order_placed = (
           SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) 
           FROM Orders
       )
       OR COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT order_id, COUNT(order_item_id) AS item_count
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY order_id
) oi_count ON o.order_id = oi_count.order_id
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (
    SELECT MIN(date_order_placed)
    FROM Orders
)
OR oi_count.item_count > 1;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
   OR COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
   OR o.order_id IN (
       SELECT order_id
       FROM Order_Items
       GROUP BY order_id
       HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
   );

WITH product_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_id,
        p.product_name,
        p.product_price,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM Products p
    JOIN Order_Items oi 
        ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_price
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(order_count) AS max_order_count
    FROM product_order_counts
)
SELECT 
    poc.product_id,
    poc.product_name,
    poc.product_price
FROM product_order_counts poc
JOIN max_count mc
    ON poc.order_count = mc.max_order_count;

-- Returning orders with the least sum of product prices
SELECT o.order_id,
       SUM(p.product_price) AS total_price
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi
  ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Products p
  ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY o.order_id
HAVING SUM(p.product_price) = (
    SELECT MIN(order_total) 
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(p2.product_price) AS order_total
        FROM Orders o2
        JOIN Order_Items oi2
          ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id
        JOIN Products p2
          ON oi2.product_id = p2.product_id
        GROUP BY o2.order_id
    ) AS totals
)
ORDER BY total_price ASC;

SELECT 
    email_address, 
    town_city, 
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code IN (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY gender_code
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MIN(gender_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS gender_count
            FROM Customers
            GROUP BY gender_code
        ) AS gender_stats
    )
);

SELECT 
    email_address, 
    town_city, 
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code IN (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY gender_code
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MIN(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Customers
            GROUP BY gender_code
        ) AS counts
    )
);

SELECT 
    email_address, 
    town_city, 
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code = (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY gender_code
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH GenderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        gender_code,
        COUNT(*) AS gender_count
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY gender_code
),
LeastCommonGender AS (
    SELECT 
        gender_code
    FROM GenderCounts
    WHERE gender_count = (
        SELECT MIN(gender_count) FROM GenderCounts
    )
)
SELECT 
    email_address,
    town_city,
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code IN (SELECT gender_code FROM LeastCommonGender);

SELECT 
    c.email_address, 
    c.town_city AS town, 
    c.county
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.gender_code IN (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM (
        SELECT gender_code, COUNT(*) AS gender_count
        FROM Customers
        GROUP BY gender_code
    ) gc
    WHERE gc.gender_count = (
        SELECT MIN(gender_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT gender_code, COUNT(*) AS gender_count
            FROM Customers
            GROUP BY gender_code
        ) g2
    )
);

    SELECT gender_code
    FROM Customers cu
    JOIN Orders o ON cu.customer_id = o.customer_id

    ORDER BY COUNT(o.order_id) ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    c.email_address,
    c.town_city,
    c.county
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.gender_code IN (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM (
        SELECT c.gender_code, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
        FROM Customers c
        JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
        GROUP BY c.gender_code
    ) gender_orders
    WHERE order_count = (
        SELECT MIN(order_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT c.gender_code, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
            FROM Customers c
            JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
            GROUP BY c.gender_code
        ) counts
    )
);

WITH gender_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender_code,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
    FROM Customers c
    LEFT JOIN Orders o 
        ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    GROUP BY c.gender_code
),
least_order_gender AS (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM gender_order_counts
    ORDER BY order_count ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    c.email_address,
    c.town_city,
    c.county
FROM Customers c
JOIN least_order_gender g
    ON c.gender_code = g.gender_code;

SELECT 
    c.email_address, 
    c.town_city, 
    c.county
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.gender_code = (
    SELECT cu.gender_code
    FROM Customers cu
    JOIN Orders o ON cu.customer_id = o.customer_id
    GROUP BY cu.gender_code
    ORDER BY COUNT(o.order_id) ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH GenderOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender_code,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
    FROM Customers c
    LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    GROUP BY c.gender_code
),
LeastFrequentGender AS (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM GenderOrderCounts
    WHERE order_count = (
        SELECT MIN(order_count) FROM GenderOrderCounts
    )
)
SELECT 
    c.email_address,
    c.town_city,
    c.county
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.gender_code IN (SELECT gender_code FROM LeastFrequentGender);

SELECT 
    Student_ID,
    First_Name,
    Middle_Name,
    Last_Name,
    Gender_MFU,
    Student_Address,
    Email_Adress,
    Cell_Mobile_Phone,
    Home_Phone
FROM Students;

SELECT 
    s.Student_ID,
    s.First_Name,
    s.Middle_Name,
    s.Last_Name,
    s.Gender_MFU,
    s.Student_Address,
    s.Email_Adress,
    s.Cell_Mobile_Phone,
    s.Home_Phone,
    sa.Student_Answer_ID,
    sa.Exam_ID,
    e.Exam_Name,
    e.Subject_Code,
    e.Exam_Date,
    e.Exam_Name,
    sa.Question_ID,
    q.Question_Text,
    q.Type_of_Question_Code,
    sa.Date_of_Answer,
    sa.Comments,
    sa.Satisfactory_YN AS SA_Satisfactory_YN,
    sa.Student_Answer_Text AS SA_Answer_Text,
    sas.Valid_Answer_ID,
    va.Valid_Answer_Text,
    sas.Satisfactory_YN AS Assessment_Satisfactory_YN,
    sas.Assessment AS Assessment_Result
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN Student_Answers sa 
    ON s.Student_ID = sa.Student_ID
LEFT JOIN Exams e 
    ON sa.Exam_ID = e.Exam_ID
LEFT JOIN Questions q 
    ON sa.Question_ID = q.Question_ID
LEFT JOIN Student_Assessments sas 
    ON sa.Student_Answer_ID = sas.Student_Answer_ID
LEFT JOIN Valid_Answers va 
    ON sas.Valid_Answer_ID = va.Valid_Answer_ID
ORDER BY s.Student_ID;

SELECT
    s.Student_ID,
    s.First_Name,
    s.Middle_Name,
    s.Last_Name,
    s.Gender_MFU,
    s.Student_Address,
    s.Email_Adress,
    s.Cell_Mobile_Phone,
    s.Home_Phone,
    sa.Student_Answer_ID,
    sa.Exam_ID,
    sa.Question_ID,
    sa.Date_of_Answer,
    sa.Comments,
    sa.Satisfactory_YN AS Answer_Satisfactory_YN,
    sa.Student_Answer_Text AS Raw_Student_Answer_Text,
    e.Subject_Code,
    e.Exam_Date,
    e.Exam_Name,
    q.Type_of_Question_Code,
    q.Question_Text,
    va.Valid_Answer_ID,
    va.Valid_Answer_Text,
    sas.Student_Answer_Text AS Assessed_Answer_Text,
    sas.Satisfactory_YN AS Assessed_Satisfactory_YN,
    sas.Assessment
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN Student_Answers sa 
    ON s.Student_ID = sa.Student_ID
LEFT JOIN Exams e
    ON sa.Exam_ID = e.Exam_ID
LEFT JOIN Questions q
    ON sa.Question_ID = q.Question_ID
LEFT JOIN Student_Assessments sas
    ON sa.Student_Answer_ID = sas.Student_Answer_ID
LEFT JOIN Valid_Answers va
    ON sas.Valid_Answer_ID = va.Valid_Answer_ID;

WITH PaymentMethodCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        payment_method_code,
        COUNT(*) AS method_count
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY payment_method_code
),
MinCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(method_count) AS min_method_count
    FROM PaymentMethodCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.customer_name,
    c.payment_method_code
FROM Customers c
JOIN PaymentMethodCounts pmc 
    ON c.payment_method_code = pmc.payment_method_code
JOIN MinCount mc 
    ON pmc.method_count = mc.min_method_count;

WITH ServiceUsage AS (
    SELECT 
        Service_ID, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_ID) AS usage_count
    FROM Customers_and_Services
    GROUP BY Service_ID
),
LeastUsage AS (
    SELECT Service_ID
    FROM ServiceUsage
    WHERE usage_count = (SELECT MIN(usage_count) FROM ServiceUsage)
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.Customer_Details
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customers_and_Services cs 
    ON c.Customer_ID = cs.Customer_ID
JOIN LeastUsage lu 
    ON cs.Service_ID = lu.Service_ID;

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Condition 1: Students with 2 or more classes
    SELECT c.student_id
    FROM Classes c
    GROUP BY c.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(c.class_id) >= 2
    UNION
    -- Condition 2: Students with less than 2 detentions
    SELECT d.student_id
    FROM Detention d
    GROUP BY d.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) < 2
);

SELECT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(class_id) >= 2
    
    UNION
    
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(detention_id) < 2
);

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
JOIN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(class_id) >= 2
    UNION
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(detention_id) < 2
) AS qualified ON s.student_id = qualified.student_id;

SELECT 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN Classes c 
    ON s.student_id = c.student_id
LEFT JOIN Detention d 
    ON s.student_id = d.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.bio_data
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.class_id) >= 2
    OR COUNT(DISTINCT d.detention_id) < 2;

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
JOIN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(class_id) >= 2
) AS class_counts
ON s.student_id = class_counts.student_id

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
JOIN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(detention_id) < 2
) AS detention_counts
ON s.student_id = detention_counts.student_id;

    s.bio_data

    ON s.student_id = c.student_id

GROUP BY s.student_id, s.bio_data
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.class_id) >= 2
    OR COUNT(DISTINCT d.detention_id) < 2;

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(class_id) >= 2

OR s.student_id IN (

    HAVING COUNT(detention_id) < 2

SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.bio_data
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS class_count
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
) c ON s.student_id = c.student_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS detention_count
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
) d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(c.class_count, 0) >= 2
    OR COALESCE(d.detention_count, 0) < 2;

WITH ClassCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(class_id) AS classes_count
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
),
DetentionCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(detention_id) AS detention_count
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.bio_data
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN ClassCounts cc ON s.student_id = cc.student_id
LEFT JOIN DetentionCounts dc ON s.student_id = dc.student_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(cc.classes_count, 0) >= 2
    OR COALESCE(dc.detention_count, 0) < 2;

SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.bio_data
FROM Students s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(*) AS class_count
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
) cc ON s.student_id = cc.student_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(*) AS detention_count
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
) dc ON s.student_id = dc.student_id
WHERE 
    (cc.class_count >= 2)
    OR (COALESCE(dc.detention_count, 0) < 2);

SELECT 
    bm.behaviour_monitoring_details,
    COUNT(DISTINCT bm.student_id) AS student_count
FROM Behaviour_Monitoring bm
GROUP BY bm.behaviour_monitoring_details
ORDER BY student_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH behaviour_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        behaviour_monitoring_details,
        COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS student_count
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(student_count) AS max_student_count
    FROM behaviour_counts
)
SELECT 
    bc.behaviour_monitoring_details,
    bc.student_count
FROM behaviour_counts bc
JOIN max_count mc 
    ON bc.student_count = mc.max_student_count;

WITH DetailCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        behaviour_monitoring_details,
        COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS student_count
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(student_count) AS max_student_count
    FROM DetailCounts
)
SELECT 
    d.behaviour_monitoring_details,
    d.student_count
FROM DetailCounts d
JOIN MaxCount m 
    ON d.student_count = m.max_student_count;

       COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS student_count
FROM Behaviour_Monitoring

        behaviour_monitoring_details,
        occurrence_count
    FROM detail_counts

    )
)

    m.behaviour_monitoring_details,
    COUNT(DISTINCT bm.student_id) AS student_count
FROM max_detail m
JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring bm 
    ON bm.behaviour_monitoring_details = m.behaviour_monitoring_details
GROUP BY m.behaviour_monitoring_details;

SELECT c2.Collection_Name AS Parent_Collection_Name
FROM Collections AS c1
JOIN Collections AS c2
  ON c1.Parent_Collection_ID = c2.Collection_ID
WHERE c1.Collection_Name = 'Nice';

WITH RECURSIVE ParentCollections AS (
    -- Base case: direct parent of 'Nice'
    SELECT p.Collection_ID, p.Collection_Name, p.Parent_Collection_ID
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collections p 
      ON c.Parent_Collection_ID = p.Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Nice'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: parent of the current parent
    SELECT p.Collection_ID, p.Collection_Name, p.Parent_Collection_ID
    FROM Collections p
    JOIN ParentCollections pc 
      ON pc.Parent_Collection_ID = p.Collection_ID
)
SELECT Collection_Name
FROM ParentCollections;

WITH RECURSIVE Parent_Collections AS (
    SELECT 
        Collection_ID,
        Parent_Collection_ID,
        Collection_Name
    FROM Collections
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Nice'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        c.Collection_ID,
        c.Parent_Collection_ID,
        c.Collection_Name
    FROM Collections c
    INNER JOIN Parent_Collections pc 
        ON c.Collection_ID = pc.Parent_Collection_ID
)
SELECT Collection_Name
FROM Parent_Collections
WHERE Collection_Name <> 'Nice';

SELECT c_parent.Collection_Name
FROM Collections AS c_child
JOIN Collections AS c_parent
  ON c_child.Parent_Collection_ID = c_parent.Collection_ID
WHERE c_child.Collection_Name = 'Nice';

WITH RECURSIVE Parent_Collections AS (
    -- starting point: the collection named 'Nice'
    SELECT 
        c.Collection_ID,
        c.Parent_Collection_ID,
        c.Collection_Name
    FROM Collections c
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Nice'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- recursive step: get the parent collection
    SELECT 
        p.Collection_ID,
        p.Parent_Collection_ID,
        p.Collection_Name
    FROM Collections p
    INNER JOIN Parent_Collections pc
        ON pc.Parent_Collection_ID = p.Collection_ID
)
SELECT Collection_Name
FROM Parent_Collections
WHERE Collection_Name <> 'Nice';

WITH related_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.Document_Object_ID,
        COUNT(dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID) AS related_count
    FROM Document_Objects d
    LEFT JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm
        ON d.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID
    GROUP BY d.Document_Object_ID
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(related_count) AS min_related_count
    FROM related_counts
)
SELECT rc.Document_Object_ID, rc.related_count
FROM related_counts rc
JOIN min_count mc
  ON rc.related_count = mc.min_related_count;

        FROM Documents_in_Collections

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT csm.Related_Collection_ID) AS related_collections_count
FROM Collections AS c
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members AS csm
  ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c_related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM Collections c_best
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm
  ON c_best.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
JOIN Collections c_related
  ON csm.Related_Collection_ID = c_related.Collection_ID
WHERE c_best.Collection_Name = 'Best';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.Collection_ID) AS RelatedCollectionCount
FROM Collections c1
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm
  ON c1.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
JOIN Collections c2
  ON csm.Related_Collection_ID = c2.Collection_ID
WHERE c1.Collection_Name = 'Best';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT csm.Related_Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM Collection_Subset_Members AS csm
JOIN Collections AS c
  ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related_collections_id) AS Related_Collections_Count
FROM (
    SELECT csm.Related_Collection_ID AS related_collections_id
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collections c ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    
    UNION
    
    SELECT csm.Collection_ID AS related_collections_id
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collections c ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
) AS related;

827:
SELECT c.city_name
FROM (
    SELECT dd.city2_code AS other_city, dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN City chicago ON dd.city1_code = chicago.city_code
    WHERE chicago.city_name = 'Chicago'
    UNION
    SELECT dd.city1_code AS other_city, dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN City chicago ON dd.city2_code = chicago.city_code
    WHERE chicago.city_name = 'Chicago'
) AS all_distances
JOIN City c ON all_distances.other_city = c.city_code
ORDER BY all_distances.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance d
JOIN City c 
  ON c.city_code = CASE 
                      WHEN d.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago')
                      THEN d.city2_code
                      ELSE d.city1_code
                   END
WHERE (d.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago')
    OR d.city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'))
ORDER BY d.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance dd
JOIN City chicago ON chicago.city_name = 'Chicago'
JOIN City c 
  ON c.city_code = CASE 
      WHEN dd.city1_code = chicago.city_code THEN dd.city2_code
      ELSE dd.city1_code
    END
WHERE dd.city1_code = chicago.city_code 
   OR dd.city2_code = chicago.city_code
ORDER BY dd.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance dd
JOIN City c 
  ON c.city_code = CASE 
      WHEN dd.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago') 
      THEN dd.city2_code
      ELSE dd.city1_code
     END
WHERE dd.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago')
   OR dd.city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Chicago')
ORDER BY dd.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM City AS chicago
JOIN Direct_distance AS dd
  ON dd.city1_code = chicago.city_code OR dd.city2_code = chicago.city_code
JOIN City AS c
  ON c.city_code = CASE 
                     WHEN dd.city1_code = chicago.city_code THEN dd.city2_code
                     ELSE dd.city1_code
                   END
WHERE chicago.city_name = 'Chicago'
ORDER BY dd.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY d.distance ASC

FROM (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) AS all_distances
GROUP BY city_code;

FROM (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) AS all_distances
GROUP BY city_code;

SELECT city_code, SUM(total_distance) AS total_distance_to_all
FROM (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, SUM(distance) AS total_distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    GROUP BY city1_code
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, SUM(distance) AS total_distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    GROUP BY city2_code
) AS combined
GROUP BY city_code;

SELECT city_code, SUM(total_distance) AS total_distance
FROM (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance AS total_distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance AS total_distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) AS combined
GROUP BY city_code
ORDER BY city_code;

SELECT 
    c.city_code,
    COALESCE(SUM(dd.distance), 0) AS total_distance
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) dd
ON c.city_code = dd.city_code
GROUP BY c.city_code
ORDER BY c.city_code;
830:
SELECT c.city_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN dd.city1_code = bos.city_code THEN dd.city2_code
            ELSE dd.city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN City bos 
      ON bos.city_code IN (dd.city1_code, dd.city2_code)
    WHERE bos.city_name = 'Boston'
) AS dist
JOIN City c ON c.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = b.city_code THEN d.city2_code
            ELSE d.city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    JOIN City b 
        ON b.city_name = 'Boston'
        AND (d.city1_code = b.city_code OR d.city2_code = b.city_code)
) AS dist
JOIN City c ON c.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM (
    SELECT dd.city2_code AS far_city_code, dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN City cb ON cb.city_code = dd.city1_code
    WHERE cb.city_name = 'Boston'
    
    UNION
    
    SELECT dd.city1_code AS far_city_code, dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN City cb ON cb.city_code = dd.city2_code
    WHERE cb.city_name = 'Boston'
) AS distances
JOIN City c ON c.city_code = distances.far_city_code
ORDER BY distances.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE (d.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Boston')

ORDER BY d.distance DESC

829:
SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance dd
JOIN City boston
  ON boston.city_name = 'Boston'
JOIN City c
  ON (dd.city1_code = boston.city_code AND dd.city2_code = c.city_code)
     OR (dd.city2_code = boston.city_code AND dd.city1_code = c.city_code)
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH BostonCode AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM City
    WHERE city_name = 'Boston'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT dd.distance, c.city_name
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN BostonCode b ON dd.city1_code = b.city_code
    JOIN City c ON dd.city2_code = c.city_code
    UNION
    SELECT dd.distance, c.city_name
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN BostonCode b ON dd.city2_code = b.city_code
    JOIN City c ON dd.city1_code = c.city_code
)
SELECT city_name
FROM Distances
ORDER BY distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance dd
JOIN City cb ON cb.city_name = 'Boston'
JOIN City c 
  ON (dd.city1_code = cb.city_code AND dd.city2_code = c.city_code)
  OR (dd.city2_code = cb.city_code AND dd.city1_code = c.city_code)
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM Direct_distance d
JOIN City cb ON cb.city_name = 'Boston'
JOIN City c 
  ON ( (d.city1_code = cb.city_code AND c.city_code = d.city2_code)
    OR (d.city2_code = cb.city_code AND c.city_code = d.city1_code) )
ORDER BY d.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.city_name
FROM (
  SELECT 
    d.distance,
    CASE 
      WHEN d.city1_code = b.city_code THEN d.city2_code 
      ELSE d.city1_code 
    END AS other_city
  FROM Direct_distance d
  JOIN City b ON (d.city1_code = b.city_code OR d.city2_code = b.city_code)
  WHERE b.city_name = 'Boston'
) AS distances
JOIN City c ON c.city_code = distances.other_city
ORDER BY distances.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

       AVG(dd.distance) AS avg_distance
FROM (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, city2_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, city1_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) dd
JOIN City c ON dd.city_code = c.city_code
GROUP BY c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG(distances.distance) AS avg_distance
FROM City c
JOIN (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) AS distances
ON c.city_code = distances.city_code
GROUP BY c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG_D.avg_distance
FROM City c
JOIN (
    SELECT city_code, AVG(distance) AS avg_distance
    FROM (
        SELECT city1_code AS city_code, city2_code AS other_city, distance
        FROM Direct_distance
        UNION ALL
        SELECT city2_code AS city_code, city1_code AS other_city, distance
        FROM Direct_distance
    ) AS all_distances
    GROUP BY city_code
) AS AVG_D
ON c.city_code = AVG_D.city_code
ORDER BY c.city_name;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN city1_code = lc.city_code THEN city2_code
            ELSE city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN LindaCity lc
        ON dd.city1_code = lc.city_code 
        OR dd.city2_code = lc.city_code
)
SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Student s
JOIN Distances d
    ON s.city_code = d.other_city_code
ORDER BY d.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Student s
JOIN Direct_distance dd
  ON ( (dd.city1_code = (SELECT city_code 
                         FROM Student 
                         WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith') 
        AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
     OR
       (dd.city2_code = (SELECT city_code 
                         FROM Student 
                         WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith') 
        AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code) )
WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.LName = 'Smith')
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Student s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN city1_code = ls.city_code THEN city2_code
            ELSE city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN (
        SELECT city_code
        FROM Student
        WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
        LIMIT 1
    ) ls
    ON dd.city1_code = ls.city_code OR dd.city2_code = ls.city_code
) dist
ON s.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH LindaCity AS (

    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),

        END AS other_city_code,
        distance

      ON dd.city1_code = lc.city_code
      OR dd.city2_code = lc.city_code
)
SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Distances d
JOIN Student s
  ON s.city_code = d.other_city_code
ORDER BY d.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Student AS s
JOIN Direct_distance AS dd
JOIN Student AS linda
  ON linda.Fname = 'Linda' AND linda.LName = 'Smith'
-- Match Linda's city with either city1_code or city2_code
ON (
    (dd.city1_code = linda.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
    OR
    (dd.city2_code = linda.city_code AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code)
   )
WHERE s.StuID <> linda.StuID
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT CONCAT(s.Fname, ' ', s.LName) AS full_name
FROM Student AS s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN city1_code = ls.city_code THEN city2_code
            ELSE city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT city_code
        FROM Student
        WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
    ) AS ls
    WHERE city1_code = ls.city_code OR city2_code = ls.city_code
) AS dist ON s.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname || ' ' || s.Lname AS full_name
FROM Student s
JOIN (
    -- Get the city code of Linda Smith
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM Student 
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND Lname = 'Smith'
) linda_city
JOIN Direct_distance dd 
    ON (dd.city1_code = linda_city.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
    OR (dd.city2_code = linda_city.city_code AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code)
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        d.distance
    FROM Student s
    JOIN LindaCity lc ON 1=1
    JOIN Direct_distance d 
        ON (d.city1_code = lc.city_code AND d.city2_code = s.city_code)
        OR (d.city2_code = lc.city_code AND d.city1_code = s.city_code)
    WHERE s.Fname <> 'Linda' OR s.LName <> 'Smith'
)
SELECT 
    Fname || ' ' || LName AS full_name
FROM Distances
ORDER BY distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname || ' ' || s.Lname AS full_name
FROM Student s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = linda_city.city_code THEN d.city2_code
            ELSE d.city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    JOIN (
        SELECT city_code
        FROM Student
        WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
    ) linda_city
      ON d.city1_code = linda_city.city_code
       OR d.city2_code = linda_city.city_code
) dist
  ON s.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Fname, s.LName
FROM Student s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN city1_code = lc.LindaCityCode THEN city2_code
            ELSE city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    JOIN (SELECT city_code AS LindaCityCode 
          FROM Student 
          WHERE Fname='Linda' AND LName='Smith') lc
      ON dd.city1_code = lc.LindaCityCode 
         OR dd.city2_code = lc.LindaCityCode
) dist
  ON s.city_code = dist.other_city_code
ORDER BY dist.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    a.name AS author_name,
    SUM(COALESCE(citation_counts.citation_count, 0)) AS total_citations
FROM Author a
JOIN Author_list al ON a.author_id = al.author_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        cited_paper_id,
        COUNT(*) AS citation_count
    FROM Citation
    GROUP BY cited_paper_id
) AS citation_counts ON al.paper_id = citation_counts.cited_paper_id
GROUP BY a.name
ORDER BY total_citations DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH paper_citations AS (
    SELECT
        cited_paper_id AS paper_id,
        COUNT(*) AS citation_count
    FROM Citation
    GROUP BY cited_paper_id
),
author_citations AS (
    SELECT
        a.author_id,
        a.name,
        COALESCE(SUM(pc.citation_count), 0) AS total_citations
    FROM Author a
    JOIN Author_list al ON a.author_id = al.author_id
    LEFT JOIN paper_citations pc ON al.paper_id = pc.paper_id
    GROUP BY a.author_id, a.name
)
SELECT
    name,
    total_citations
FROM author_citations
ORDER BY total_citations DESC
LIMIT 1;

    FROM Author_list
    GROUP BY paper_id

WHERE ac.author_count = (
    SELECT MAX(author_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) AS author_count
        FROM Author_list
        GROUP BY paper_id
    ) sub
);

    ON al.paper_id = high_cited_papers.paper_id

1083:
SELECT DISTINCT s.name
FROM staff s
JOIN conference_participation cp_speaker 
    ON s.staff_ID = cp_speaker.staff_ID
    AND cp_speaker.role = 'speaker'
JOIN conference_participation cp_sponsor
    ON s.staff_ID = cp_sponsor.staff_ID
    AND cp_sponsor.role = 'sponsor'
    AND cp_speaker.Conference_ID = cp_sponsor.Conference_ID;

SELECT DISTINCT s.name
FROM staff s
JOIN conference_participation cp ON s.staff_ID = cp.staff_ID
GROUP BY s.staff_ID, cp.Conference_ID, s.name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(cp.role) = 'speaker' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(cp.role) = 'sponsor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0;

SELECT DISTINCT s.name
FROM conference_participation AS cp1
JOIN conference_participation AS cp2
  ON cp1.Conference_ID = cp2.Conference_ID
  AND cp1.staff_ID = cp2.staff_ID
JOIN staff AS s
  ON cp1.staff_ID = s.staff_ID
WHERE cp1.role = 'speaker'
  AND cp2.role = 'sponsor';

SELECT DISTINCT s.name
FROM conference_participation cp_speaker
JOIN conference_participation cp_sponsor
  ON cp_speaker.Conference_ID = cp_sponsor.Conference_ID
  AND cp_speaker.staff_ID = cp_sponsor.staff_ID
JOIN staff s
  ON s.staff_ID = cp_speaker.staff_ID
WHERE cp_speaker.role = 'speaker'
  AND cp_sponsor.role = 'sponsor';

SELECT DISTINCT s.name
FROM staff s
JOIN conference_participation cp 
  ON s.staff_ID = cp.staff_ID
GROUP BY s.staff_ID, cp.Conference_ID, s.name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(cp.role) = 'speaker' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(cp.role) = 'sponsor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0;

  ON cp_speaker.Conference_ID = cp_sponsor.Conference_ID

  ON s.staff_ID = cp_speaker.staff_ID

  AND cp_sponsor.role = 'sponsor';

    ps.plane_name, 
    ps.pilot_name

        plane_name, 
        MAX(age) AS max_age
    FROM PilotSkills
    GROUP BY plane_name
) max_per_plane
    ON ps.plane_name = max_per_plane.plane_name
    AND ps.age = max_per_plane.max_age
ORDER BY ps.plane_name;

    AVG(p.height_mm) AS avg_height_mm,
    AVG(p.width_mm) AS avg_width_mm
FROM Artists a
JOIN Paintings p
    ON a.artistID = p.painterID
GROUP BY a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
ORDER BY a.lname, a.fname;

    a.lname || ', ' || a.fname AS painter_name,

  a.fname,
  COUNT(p.paintingID) AS total_paintings
FROM Artists AS a
JOIN Paintings AS p
  ON a.artistID = p.painterID
GROUP BY a.artistID, a.fname
HAVING COUNT(p.paintingID) >= 2;

SELECT a.fname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT p.paintingID) + COUNT(DISTINCT s.sculptureID) AS total_works
FROM Artists a
LEFT JOIN Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
LEFT JOIN Sculptures s ON a.artistID = s.sculptorID
WHERE a.artistID IN (
    SELECT painterID
    FROM Paintings
    GROUP BY painterID
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
GROUP BY a.artistID, a.fname;

SELECT a.fname,
       COUNT(p.paintingID) AS painting_count,
       COALESCE(COUNT(p.paintingID),0) + 
       COALESCE(s.sculpture_count,0) AS total_works
FROM Artists a
JOIN Paintings p
  ON a.artistID = p.painterID
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT sculptorID, COUNT(*) AS sculpture_count
    FROM Sculptures
    GROUP BY sculptorID
) s
  ON a.artistID = s.sculptorID
GROUP BY a.artistID, a.fname, s.sculpture_count
HAVING COUNT(p.paintingID) >= 2;

SELECT AVG(room_count_per_property) AS avg_rooms_for_garden_properties
FROM (
    SELECT p.property_id, COUNT(r.room_number) AS room_count_per_property
    FROM Properties p
    JOIN Property_Features pf 
        ON p.property_id = pf.property_id
    JOIN Features f 
        ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    JOIN Rooms r
        ON p.property_id = r.property_id
    WHERE LOWER(f.feature_name) LIKE '%garden%'
       OR LOWER(f.feature_description) LIKE '%garden%'
    GROUP BY p.property_id
) sub;

SELECT AVG(room_count) AS avg_rooms_with_garden
FROM (
    SELECT r.property_id, COUNT(r.room_number) AS room_count
    FROM Rooms r
    INNER JOIN Property_Features pf

    INNER JOIN Features f 
        ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    WHERE LOWER(f.feature_name) = 'garden'
    GROUP BY r.property_id
) sub;

SELECT SUM(p.price_max) AS total_max_price
FROM Properties p
JOIN Users u 
  ON p.owner_user_id = u.user_id
JOIN Ref_User_Categories uc 
  ON u.user_category_code = uc.user_category_code
WHERE uc.user_category_description LIKE '%single mother%'
   OR uc.user_category_description LIKE '%student%';

SELECT 
    CONCAT(
        u.first_name, 
        ' ', 
        COALESCE(u.middle_name, ''), 
        CASE WHEN u.middle_name IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' ELSE '' END, 
        u.last_name
    ) AS full_name
FROM Users u
JOIN Properties p
    ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
WHERE u.user_address_id = p.property_address_id;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    CONCAT(
        u.first_name, 
        CASE WHEN u.middle_name IS NOT NULL AND u.middle_name <> '' 
             THEN CONCAT(' ', u.middle_name) ELSE '' END, 
        ' ', 
        u.last_name
    ) AS full_name
FROM Users u
JOIN Properties p
    ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
    AND u.user_address_id = p.property_address_id;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
) p ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 2
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id;

SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM 
    Users u
LEFT JOIN Properties p 
    ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
LEFT JOIN User_Searches us 
    ON u.user_id = us.user_id
GROUP BY 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.property_id) >= 2
    AND COUNT(DISTINCT us.search_seq) <= 2;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
) p ON u.user_id = p.user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 2
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
) p ON u.user_id = p.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
WHERE p.property_count >= 2
  AND (s.search_count <= 2 OR s.search_count IS NULL);

    u.last_name

    ON p.owner_user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN User_Searches us 
    ON us.user_id = u.user_id
GROUP BY u.user_id, u.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.property_id) >= 2
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT us.search_seq) <= 2;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 2
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
) p ON u.user_id = p.user_id;

SELECT u.user_id, 
       u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
) p ON u.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE s.search_count <= 2
  AND p.property_count >= 2;

WITH SearchCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
),
PropertyCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        owner_user_id AS user_id,
        COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
)
SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN SearchCounts sc
    ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
JOIN PropertyCounts pc
    ON u.user_id = pc.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(sc.search_count, 0) <= 2
  AND pc.property_count >= 2;

SELECT 
    u.user_id, 
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 2
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
) p ON u.user_id = p.user_id;

SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        us.user_id,
        COUNT(us.search_seq) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches us
    GROUP BY us.user_id
) sc ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        p.owner_user_id AS user_id,
        COUNT(p.property_id) AS property_count
    FROM Properties p
    GROUP BY p.owner_user_id
) pc ON u.user_id = pc.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(sc.search_count, 0) <= 2
  AND pc.property_count >= 2;

SELECT customer_id
FROM (
    SELECT c.Id AS customer_id, g.Id AS good_id, AVG(g.Price) AS avg_price
    FROM customers c
    JOIN receipts r ON c.Id = r.CustomerId
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY c.Id, g.Id
) AS avg_per_good
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING MIN(avg_price) > 5;

SELECT CustomerId
FROM (
    SELECT r.CustomerId, i.Item, AVG(g.Price) AS avg_spending
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
) AS customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_spending) > 5;

WITH avg_per_good AS (
    SELECT r.CustomerId,
           i.Item AS GoodId,
           AVG(g.Price) AS avg_price
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
)
SELECT CustomerId
FROM avg_per_good
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_price) > 5;

SELECT customer_id
FROM (
    SELECT r.CustomerId AS customer_id, i.Item, AVG(g.Price) AS avg_price
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
) AS avg_per_good
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING MIN(avg_price) > 5;

WITH customer_good_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Id AS CustomerId,
        i.Item AS GoodId,
        AVG(g.Price) AS AvgSpent
    FROM customers c
    JOIN receipts r ON c.Id = r.CustomerId
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY c.Id, i.Item
)
SELECT CustomerId
FROM customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(AvgSpent) > 5;

    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
) avg_per_good

FROM (
    SELECT r.CustomerId, g.Id AS GoodId, AVG(g.Price) AS avg_price
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, g.Id
) AS avg_per_good
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_price) > 5;

SELECT CustomerId
FROM (
    SELECT r.CustomerId, 
           COUNT(DISTINCT g.Id) AS total_goods,
           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN AVG(g.Price) > 5 THEN g.Id END) AS goods_above_5
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, g.Id
) sub
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.Id) = COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN AVG(g.Price) > 5 THEN g.Id END);

SELECT sub.CustomerId
FROM (
    SELECT r.CustomerId, i.Item AS GoodId, AVG(g.Price) AS avg_spend
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
) AS sub
GROUP BY sub.CustomerId
HAVING MIN(sub.avg_spend) > 5;

  SELECT

    AVG(g.Price) AS avg_spent
  FROM receipts r
  JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
  JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
  GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
)
SELECT customer_id
FROM avg_per_good
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING MIN(avg_spent) > 5;

SELECT u.University_Name, o.Citation_point
FROM university u
JOIN overall_ranking o ON u.University_ID = o.University_ID
WHERE o.Reputation_point >= (
    SELECT DISTINCT Reputation_point
    FROM overall_ranking
    ORDER BY Reputation_point DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2
)
ORDER BY o.Reputation_point DESC;

    ON u.University_ID = o.University_ID

    SELECT DISTINCT Reputation_point
    FROM overall_ranking
    ORDER BY Reputation_point DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2
)

SELECT 
    u.University_Name,
    o.Citation_point
FROM (
    SELECT 
        University_ID,
        Citation_point,
        Reputation_point,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY Reputation_point DESC) AS rep_rank
    FROM overall_ranking
) o
JOIN university u 
    ON u.University_ID = o.University_ID
WHERE o.rep_rank <= 3
ORDER BY o.Reputation_point DESC;

SELECT u.University_Name, o.Citation_point
FROM university u
JOIN overall_ranking o
  ON u.University_ID = o.University_ID
WHERE o.Reputation_point >= (
    SELECT Reputation_point
    FROM overall_ranking
    ORDER BY Reputation_point DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2
);

SELECT c.Name, pkg_counts.PackageCount
FROM (
    SELECT Recipient, COUNT(*) AS PackageCount
    FROM Package
    GROUP BY Recipient
) AS pkg_counts
JOIN Client c ON pkg_counts.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
WHERE pkg_counts.PackageCount = (
    SELECT MIN(sub.PackageCount)
    FROM (
        SELECT Recipient, COUNT(*) AS PackageCount
        FROM Package
        GROUP BY Recipient
    ) AS sub
);

SELECT c.Name, COUNT(*) AS total_packages_received
FROM Package p
JOIN Client c ON p.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
GROUP BY c.AccountNumber, c.Name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(package_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS package_count
        FROM Package
        GROUP BY Recipient
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT c.Name, pkg_counts.num_packages
FROM (
    SELECT p.Recipient, COUNT(*) AS num_packages
    FROM Package p
    GROUP BY p.Recipient
) AS pkg_counts
JOIN Client c
    ON pkg_counts.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
WHERE pkg_counts.num_packages = (
    SELECT MIN(counts.num_packages)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_packages
        FROM Package
        GROUP BY Recipient
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT Name, package_count
FROM (
    SELECT c.Name, COUNT(*) AS package_count
    FROM Package p
    JOIN Client c ON p.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
    GROUP BY c.Name
) AS recipient_counts
WHERE package_count = (
    SELECT MIN(package_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS package_count
        FROM Package p
        GROUP BY p.Recipient
    ) AS counts
);

JOIN Shipment s ON p.Shipment = s.ShipmentID
JOIN Planet pl ON s.Planet = pl.PlanetID
JOIN Client c ON p.Sender = c.AccountNumber
WHERE pl.Name = 'Omicron Persei 8'
   OR c.Name = 'Zapp Brannigan';

SELECT p.PackageNumber
FROM Package p
JOIN Shipment s ON p.Shipment = s.ShipmentID
JOIN Planet pl ON s.Planet = pl.PlanetID
JOIN Client c_sender ON p.Sender = c_sender.AccountNumber
WHERE pl.Name = 'Omicron Persei 8'
   OR c_sender.Name = 'Zapp Brannigan';

SELECT 
    i.invoice_id, 
    i.invoice_status, 
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN Payments p 
    ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
GROUP BY i.invoice_id, i.invoice_status, i.invoice_details
HAVING COUNT(p.payment_id) = (
    SELECT MAX(payment_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(payment_id) AS payment_count
        FROM Payments
        GROUP BY invoice_id
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN Payments p ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id

HAVING COUNT(p.payment_id) = (

    ) AS counts

SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        invoice_id,
        COUNT(payment_id) AS payment_count
    FROM Payments
    GROUP BY invoice_id
) pc
    ON i.invoice_id = pc.invoice_id
WHERE pc.payment_count = (
    SELECT MAX(payment_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            invoice_id,
            COUNT(payment_id) AS payment_count
        FROM Payments
        GROUP BY invoice_id
    ) sub
);

SELECT i.invoice_id, 
       i.invoice_status, 
       i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN (
    SELECT invoice_id, COUNT(*) AS payment_count
    FROM Payments
    GROUP BY invoice_id
) p ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
WHERE p.payment_count = (
    SELECT MAX(payment_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS payment_count
        FROM Payments
        GROUP BY invoice_id
    ) sub
);

WITH payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        invoice_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS num_payments
    FROM Payments
    GROUP BY invoice_id
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_payments) AS max_payments
    FROM payment_counts
)
SELECT 
    i.invoice_id, 
    i.invoice_status, 
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN payment_counts pc 
    ON i.invoice_id = pc.invoice_id
JOIN max_count mc 
    ON pc.num_payments = mc.max_payments;

);

    FROM (

        FROM Staff_in_Meetings
        GROUP BY staff_id
    ) AS sub
);

SELECT staff_id, meeting_count
FROM (
    SELECT staff_id, COUNT(*) AS meeting_count
    FROM Staff_in_Meetings
    GROUP BY staff_id
) AS attendance
WHERE meeting_count = (
    SELECT MIN(meeting_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT staff_id, COUNT(*) AS meeting_count
        FROM Staff_in_Meetings
        GROUP BY staff_id
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    c.sic_code, 
    c.agency_id
FROM Clients c
JOIN Meetings m 
    ON c.client_id = m.client_id
JOIN Invoices i 
    ON c.client_id = i.client_id
GROUP BY 
    c.client_id, 
    c.sic_code, 
    c.agency_id
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT m.meeting_id) = 1;
